objects.name: BI_DB_AML_Multiple_Accounts_Dep
objects.notes: 116K-row FundingID-level summary of deposit funding entities shared by ≥2 verified depositors. Source: Fact_BillingDeposit GROUP BY FundingID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CID)>=2. Filters: FundingID NOT IN (1-7), IsValidCustomer=1, IsDepositor=1, VerificationLevelID>=2. IsBlocked from External_etoro_Billing_Funding. Group_Type CASE: '5 to 20'(75%)/  '21 to 50'(16%)/'51 to 500'(7%)/'above 500'(2%). Last_Deposit_Date=MAX, Total_Approved_Deposit=SUM, Num_Approved_Deposit=COUNT.
